plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Abcotronics ERP to track job travel while you are on a trip.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Abcotronics ERP to record your location for job cards and travel distance.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow camera access for job card photos and stock-take barcode scanning.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow photo library access for job card attachments.
